patterns.name: Workflow Injection
patterns.description: User-controlled input used in workflow context
patterns.recommendation: Sanitize inputs and avoid direct interpolation
patterns.fix_plan: Do not interpolate untrusted GitHub event fields directly into shell commands. Move user input into validated allowlisted arguments or pass through action inputs with strict quoting/escaping and no eval-style expansion.

patterns.name: Unpinned Action
patterns.description: GitHub Action uses an unpinned ref
patterns.recommendation: Pin actions to a full commit SHA
patterns.fix_plan: Replace floating action refs (main/master/latest) with immutable commit SHAs and document update cadence. Add a CI check that fails when workflows introduce non-SHA action references.

patterns.name: Excessive Permissions
patterns.recommendation: Restrict permissions to the minimum required
patterns.fix_plan: Replace write-all with explicit least-privilege permissions at workflow/job scope. Set default permissions: read-all and grant write permissions only to the specific jobs that require them.

patterns.name: Secrets in Logs
patterns.fix_plan: Remove commands that echo or print secret values and use masked environment variables only where required. Pass secrets directly to tool inputs and confirm logs do not contain plaintext credentials.
